description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a low profile. The upholstery is a light, neutral fabric with a subtle tufted pattern on both the seat and backrest, giving it a plush, inviting appearance. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached. Two loose, light gray throw pillows are placed on one side for added comfort and style. The armrests are gently curved and slope downward, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's frame. The base is supported by four short, block-style wooden legs with a visible wood grain finish, providing a sturdy foundation and a touch of warmth.
description: A modern, light-colored two-seater sofa with tufted upholstery, curved armrests, and wooden block legs. Includes two matching back cushions and two loose throw pillows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's gently curved armrest and the depth of the tufted seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two seat and back cushions, tufted upholstery, and two loose throw pillows on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other curved armrest and the sofa's overall depth and cushion arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth, unadorned back panel and the continuous backrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached back cushions, all tufted and uniform in size, with two loose throw pillows on one side.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, gently curved and sloping downward, integrated with the sofa frame, medium height relative to the seat, with a smooth, padded finish.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs placed at the corners, made of wood with a visible grain, slightly recessed under the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with attached, tufted cushions, straight profile with subtle curvature at the top.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light fabric with a tufted, quilted pattern on both seat and backrest, smooth and matte finish.
